mismatches.Public_Remarks: Welcome to 864 West College Rd in Alliance! Located on a quiet road and walking distance to Mount Union, this home is ready for new owners! This 3 bedroom home features beautiful natural woodwork and two fully remodeled full bathrooms. Upon arriving, you'll notice the covered front porch, perfect for enjoying your morning coffee. Inside, you'll love the flow of the living room, dining room and into the den area that could be used as an office or extra sitting space. The kitchen offers a cozy breakfast nook, overlooking the fenced in backyard. Upstairs, the spacious bedrooms offer cedar closets and an updated full bath, along with built in storage in the hall. In the basement, you'll find the second, updated full bath. Updates include partial window replacement 2024, furnace installed roughly 2014, and roof approximately 13 years old to name a few. Text or call today to schedule your showing!

WOW! This stunning 1,722 sq ft ranch with an additional 1,500 sq ft of beautifully finished lower level offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and incredible entertaining space. The open-concept kitchen flows seamlessly into the cozy living room with a gas fireplace, creating a warm and inviting gathering area. Step outside to enjoy the composite deck overlooking a brick patio, firepit, and vinyl-fenced backyard—perfect for relaxing evenings or hosting friends and family. The spacious master suite provides a private retreat with a soaking tub, large walk-in closet, and private bath. Two additional bedrooms and a full bath complete the main level. The finished lower level truly steals the show with 8-foot ceilings, a spectacular 16-foot oak wet bar, large rec room, additional huge workout room, half bath, and generous storage space—an entertainer’s dream! Additional updates include a brand new central A/C (2025) and tankless water heater (2024) for added comfort and efficiency. Built in 2000 and beautifully maintained, this home offers over 3,200 sq ft of finished living space and is ready to impress from the moment you walk in.

Calling all investors! This 2 bedroom, 1 bath property is a solid investment opportunity with strong rental potential. Inside, an open floor plan features vinyl plank flooring throughout and a fireplace as a focal point. Tenants will appreciate the covered front porch, off-street parking, and a one car detached garage. Located near downtown Canton, public transit lines, and major roads, it offers easy access for commuting and convenience to city amenities. With desirable features and long-term value, this home is ready to generate consistent income for your portfolio. Call today to schedule your showing!
mismatches.Match_Rule: If 'Central Air' in Cooling, then HEAT should be 1, else 0

mismatches.Public_Remarks: You are invited to view this remodeled home that offers both the Old Classic Charm with the New, on the edge of Harter Heights.  Spacious living room with decorative fireplace, formal dining room both newly carpeted.  The kitchen and upstairs bathroom has been completely gutted.  There is a bonus room for office, playroom, morning room which has been finished with a new vinyyl plank flooring.  In basement is  a clothes chute, canning room and storage room, updated electric box, softner system.  The home also includes a large covered tiled front porch, ideal for relaxing outdoors.  A detached  gargage plus room to park another car.  Many updates have been done to this home, newly painted thru out, plus sewer line a hydro-jetting service and camera verification.  Water main has been excavated and cast iron soil stack in basement has been repaired.  More details of the  work completed lby professionals available.

Charming 4-bedroom, 1.5-bath home filled with natural light and timeless character. Highlights include a cozy wood-burning fireplace, arched doorways, a spacious dining area, and French doors leading to a private fenced yard. Kitchen appliances stay. The remodeled full bath features a large closet and bonus room. The finished third floor offers a versatile fourth bedroom or game room with views of the McKinley Museum and July 4th fireworks. Major updates include mini-split and central air (2021), plus furnace, windows, hot water tank, and wood shutters (2020). Enjoy relaxing on the full covered front porch. Prime location just steps from the McKinley Memorial, Museum, Monument Park, trails, and Stadium Park, and minutes from the Hall of Fame, I-77, hospitals, and restaurants.

Charming 4-bedroom, 1.5-bath home filled with natural light and timeless character. Highlights include a cozy wood-burning fireplace, arched doorways, a spacious dining area, and French doors leading to a private fenced yard. Kitchen appliances stay. The remodeled full bath features a large closet and bonus room. The finished third floor offers a versatile fourth bedroom or game room with views of the McKinley Museum and July 4th fireworks. Major updates include mini-split and central air (2021), plus furnace, windows, hot water tank, and wood shutters (2020). Enjoy relaxing on the full covered front porch. Prime location just steps from the McKinley Memorial, Museum, Monument Park, trails, and Stadium Park, and minutes from the Hall of Fame, I-77, hospitals, and restaurants.

Welcome home to this charming 4-Bed, 2-Bath Home in Canton! Discover this inviting residence with a versatile layout featuring 1 bedroom on the main level and 3 bedrooms upstairs. Unfinished attic space ready for you to create your own dream room! The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, perfect for everyday living and entertaining. The unfinished lower level offers a separate half bath + shower areas, and a storage/wine cellar for hobbyists or extra space. Enjoy the convenience of a detached 1-car garage and ample yard space. Located just minutes from local essentials to include Cleveland Clinic Mercy Hospital and Aultman Hospital, plus easy access to education, shopping, dining, and entertainment.  Call today to schedule your own private showing!

Welcome home to this charming 4-Bed, 2-Bath Home in Canton! Discover this inviting residence with a versatile layout featuring 1 bedroom on the main level and 3 bedrooms upstairs. Unfinished attic space ready for you to create your own dream room! The kitchen boasts stainless steel appliances, perfect for everyday living and entertaining. The unfinished lower level offers a separate half bath + shower areas, and a storage/wine cellar for hobbyists or extra space. Enjoy the convenience of a detached 1-car garage and ample yard space. Located just minutes from local essentials to include Cleveland Clinic Mercy Hospital and Aultman Hospital, plus easy access to education, shopping, dining, and entertainment.  Call today to schedule your own private showing!

Move-in ready 3-bedroom, two-story home situated in historic Canton Ohio. This spacious home has been totally updated with fresh paint, all new LVT flooring and carpet throughout, new windows, updated kitchen with Stainless Steel range, dishwasher and refrigerator, new vanity, shower and toilets in both bathrooms. The main level features a huge living room, dining room, dinette and kitchen.  Off of the dining room is a new sliding glass door to the private fenced in backyard with patio. Also, the front porch offers a private setting to enjoy those upcoming spring and summer days and feel the breeze and take in views of the neighborhood. The second floor offers 3 bedrooms and a large renovated full bathroom. And finally, the basement is partially finished with a full bathroom, laundry hook up, plenty of storage and glass block windows. The location is convenient to schools, the hospital, highways, and shopping. This property is ideal for an owner-occupant or an investor looking for a turnkey opportunity. The home was just recently rented for $1,200 per month with the tenant paying all utilities, offering immediate rental income potential. Property backs up to Clarendon Elementary School and is between 4th Ave and Crown Pl NW. Schedule your showing today!

Charming colonial located in historic Market Heights, full of character and timeless appeal. From the moment you step inside, you’ll appreciate the warm, inviting hardwood floors and the abundance of natural light that fills the home, creating a bright and welcoming atmosphere throughout. This home offers approx 2,500 sq ft including lower level rec space along with spacious bedrooms and comfortable living areas that blend classic charm with everyday functionality. The passthrough garage opens directly to your own private backyard sanctuary, a peaceful escape that is fully fenced for added privacy. Step out onto the large deck, perfect for entertaining guests, hosting summer cookouts, or simply relaxing and enjoying the serene setting. The backyard also features a detached garage storage shed, providing excellent space for hobbies, a workshop, or additional storage. Downstairs, the basement offers bonus recreation space, ideal for a game room, home gym, or additional living area. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, and everyday amenities, this charming home offers the perfect blend of character, comfort, and convenience in one of the area’s most beloved historic neighborhoods. Don’t miss your chance to experience all the warmth and charm this Market Heights gem has to offer.

Welcome to this beautifully updated 4 Bedroom Colonial home offering the perfect blend of classic style and modern comfort. The main level features a spacious layout perfect for everyday living and entertaining. First floor laundry is also a huge bonus! Enjoy year round relaxation in the bright four-season room filled with natural light and views of the backyard. Upstairs you will find 4 generously sized bedrooms with ample closet space. The finished basement provides additional living space ideal for a recreation room, gym or office. Updates and Improvements: NEW ROOF 2023, NEW FURNACE AND AC 2024, New Landscaping 2025, New garbage disposal 2023 and newer paint throughout. Washer and Dryer are negotiable and so is the trampoline. Please call to schedule a showing today!!!

Welcome home to this meticulously kept 3 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom log cabin-style charmer, with several features that are sure to impress both inside and out! This home is situated on over 1.5 acres, showcasing beautiful views of open fields from the covered front porch, offering a serene and private atmosphere. Upon entry, you will be greeted by a spacious living room with soaring vaulted ceilings, a wood burning stove for those cold nights in, and beautiful woodwork throughout! Kitchen offers ample cabinet space, stainless steel appliances, and tons of counter space to accommodate cooking, entertaining, and large gatherings. This home offers 1-floor living with a first floor bedroom, walk in closet, dedicated full bathroom with a claw foot tub, and first floor laundry! Upstairs showcases exquisite Brazilian hardwood floors, two more bedrooms, a full bathroom, and a spacious loft perfect for an office, library, or hunting display! Downstairs features a family room, a storage room with mechanicals, and a spacious rec room with a wet bar. Outside of the home, you have a massive 24x36 2 car garage, with plenty of space for more storage or a workshop. If that isn't enough, there is a massive pole barn, perfect for a dedicated workshop/ project area. Have a boat or other larger equipment? No problem. A smaller outbuilding/ shed behind the pole barn will have you covered. If you need even MORE areas to work or store items, there is another shed around the other side of the home. Part of the backyard is fenced, and there is a portable generator able to be hooked up as a backup for power! Upgrades include rear porch and heat pump (2019), sump pump and backup (2026), living room and kitchen flooring (2020), new shower upstairs (2024), HWT (2 years old roughly), fenced back yard a few years ago, pole barn (2020), other two outbuildings/ sheds (2021), exterior wood siding restained (2025), blacktop driveway (2024). Call today to schedule a private tour!

This charming 3-bedroom, 1.5-bath home offers unique multi-level living and plenty of character throughout. The inviting living room features beautiful bamboo flooring, adding warmth and style to the main living space. Off the main living is a bonus room that is boasting with natural light great for an office playroom or sitting area. The home’s distinctive layout creates separate levels that provide both functionality and privacy. Located in a desirable area of Jackson TWP, this property offers convenience to local amenities, schools, and shopping. Step outside to enjoy the backyard, complete with a newer above-ground pool—perfect for relaxing or entertaining during the warmer months. With its character, comfortable layout, and great location, this home is a wonderful opportunity for anyone looking for both charm and practicality.  The seller has made several updates including windows, roof, carpet and planked flooring, mini splits, plumbing, garage doors, service upgraded and more see attached update list!

Bright and inviting family room featuring a corner electric fireplace (convertible to gas), sliding doors leading to the deck, and a fenced backyard complete with an outbuilding/shed. New carpet throughout the home adds a fresh, updated feel. The nicely sized eat-in kitchen offers a breakfast bar, appliances, and an open layout to the family room—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. A convenient main-floor laundry room with sink completes the level. Upstairs, the owner’s suite features new carpet, a walk-in closet, and a private full bath. Two additional bedrooms—also with new carpet—and another full bath provide comfortable space for family or guests. The lower level includes a partially finished rec room with new carpet, offering additional living or recreation space. Situated on a level lot in desirable Jackson Township and served by Jackson Local Schools.

Welcome to 6496 Sandava, this 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom home offers the perfect blend of comfort, space, and privacy in the desirable Jackson Local School District. Lovingly cared for and beautifully maintained by its owner, the main level offers a living room, which can be used as an office or den; a family room with a cozy wood-burning fireplace, a kitchen, and a formal dining room. The new LVP floor was installed throughout most of the 1st floor (2025). The whole house was freshly painted. The eat-in kitchen featured a breakfast area, solid-surface countertops, a pantry, and SS appliances, a brand new dishwasher (2026), and a picture window to overlook the back yard - cozy and relaxing. First-floor laundry room is a plus for added convenience. Upstairs, you’ll find three spacious bedrooms, including a private primary suite, and a guest bathroom. The unfinished basement is a potential space for you to use as a workshop, play area, or entertainment space. Enjoy the fully fenced back yard (2021). Newer window for the whole house (2022). The house has been duct cleaned on (2025). Great location, Heart of Jackson township, just minutes from shopping, dining, and everyday conveniences, easy access to highway 77. This move-in-ready home combines comfort, style, and location. Don’t miss it for your own. Home warranty is provided
mismatches.Match_Rule: If 'Central Air' in Cooling, then HEAT should be 1, else 0

mismatches.Public_Remarks: Looking for your vacation home year round. Experience all the seasons from this amazing property with views for miles. The sunsets are magnificent and the privacy hard to find on this 6+ acre property in Jackson Township/Jackson Schools. This sprawling Ranch offers spacious rooms that are full of character, charm and modern amenities. Enter the front door and you are welcomed into a gracious Great Room that boasts vaulted and beamed ceilings, wall of windows, built in wet bar and an oversized floor to ceiling wood burning fireplace with brick surround. Casual Living and entertaining flows from the Kitchen/Dining rooms into the Family room that also has a beamed ceiling, many windows and another wide hearth Gas Log Fireplace with brick surround. Enjoy cooler winter days absorbing Vitamin D in your beautiful four season room that has heated tile floors, walls of windows and charming built ins. Adjacent to the Owners retreat this wing of the house is a joy to take in. The Owners bedroom offers Vaulted ceilings, another gas log fireplace, a Spa like Owners Bathroom and Walk in Closet that is a room all by itself. The split bedroom design affords privacy and plenty of sleeping space. There are 3 additional large bedrooms with 2 full bathrooms, laundry room, Library (possible 5th bedroom) and study space. Hard to believe but there is also additional living space in the Lower Level Office/Game room and 4th full bathroom. In addition the property has 3 acres that are wired for Invisible Pet Fence. So many possibilities here, you won't be disappointed. Welcome home!

Move-in ready ranch on a beautiful 1-acre lot in Lake School District! This bright and inviting home offers an open feel with natural light throughout and thoughtful updates that make it easy to move right in. The welcoming great room features arched doorways and large windows, creating a warm and airy living space perfect for everyday living or entertaining. The updated eat-in kitchen includes white cabinetry, subway tile backsplash, modern lighting, and a large pantry for extra storage. Just off the kitchen you’ll find two comfortable bedrooms, a full bath, and an oversized linen closet. Important updates provide peace of mind, including a new mound septic system installed in 2023 and a waterproofed basement with sump pump installed in 2025. Step outside to enjoy the covered back porch and patio, ideal for relaxing evenings enjoying your private acre of outdoor space. The property is completed by a 2-car garage with additional storage. Homes with an acre of land, updates, and this location in Lake Schools don’t come along often! Schedule your private showing today.

This ranch property offers many updates and has so much to offer its new owners. The property features a fenced front and rear yard, covered front and back porch, perfect for those spring evenings or entertaining. The interior of the home has new carpet, a very spacious living room, Kitchen with stainless steel appliances and LVT flooring, full bath with walk in shower and seat, large primary bedroom with first floor laundry. One year America's Preferred Home Warranty included. Front and rear fence installed 2016. New Trane Furnace and Central Air installed May 2021. Kitchen updated in August of 2021. Blown in insulation in wall and attic installed March 2021. Bathroom updated in 2018. New carpet installed 2026. Appliances 2016. Garage door opener 2026. Agent owned.

One-owner, custom-built and set on Sippo Lake—this is a rare opportunity. Water views carry through nearly every room, with vaulted ceilings and a fireplace creating a comfortable main living space. The kitchen offers lake views, and the living room opens to a balcony/deck overlooking the water. The main level also features a dedicated home office, a dining room ideal for hosting, and a primary en-suite with walk-in closet and accessible jetted tub. Laundry on the main level and storage throughout add everyday convenience. The walk-out lower level adds flexibility for entertaining, complete with a wet bar, fireplace, and access to a paver patio just steps from the lake. A 3-car garage and circular driveway add convenience and curb appeal. Set within the Sippo Lake community on a 99 acre lake, you’ll enjoy access to over 300 acres of parkland with trails, fishing, paddling, and wildlife, along with a clubhouse and year-round programs—all ideally located between Canton and Massillon in Perry Township. Being offered as-is, this home presents a unique opportunity to make it your own in a setting that’s hard to find. Make this lake house your home.

Nice updated ranch home situated on a .57-acre lot. The main level features a spacious eat-in kitchen with Corian countertops, a pantry, and stainless steel appliances. Large living room with a front entrance and a fireplace. Two bedrooms and an updated full bathroom complete the main level. The lower level is divided for a multitude of uses, including a laundry room, utility room, rec room, and a potential third bedroom. The attached 2-car garage overlooks the huge backyard, perfect for playing and entertaining. Don't miss this ranch home in Plain LSD.

mismatches.Public_Remarks: Welcome to 8038 Norriton Circle! Tucked away in a quiet North Canton community, this charming condo offers low- maintenance living with 2 bedrooms and 2 full baths, just minutes from local amenities! The open concept main level features a comfortable living and dining area that flows into a well-appointed kitchen, perfect for everyday living and entertaining. Both bedrooms are generously sized with ample closet space, and two full bathrooms provide convenience for residents and guests. The finished rec room in the basement adds  valuable extra living space ideal for a family room, home office, workout area or hobby room-while still offering additional storage in the lower level. Outside, enjoy a composite deck with virtually no maintenance, and take advantage of community amenities including a clubhouse and swimming pool for relaxing, socializing, and staying active! This is one you will want to check out in person to see all it has to offer. Call your favorite agent today and schedule a tour!

This is one you will want to check out in person to see all it has to offer. Call your favorite agent today and schedule a tour!

Well-maintained 4-way split-level family home in desirable Canal Fulton! This spacious 4-bedroom, 2-bath residence offers 1,744 sq ft of comfortable living with multiple living spaces perfect for everyday life and entertaining. The thoughtfully designed layout includes a finished basement for added flexibility—ideal as a family room, home office, or recreation space. A two-car garage provides convenience and storage. Located in the highly regarded Northwest School District, this home offers peace of mind with major updates already completed, including a newer roof (2018) and hot water tank (2023). A great opportunity to own a move-in-ready home in a welcoming community. Schedule a private showing today! You dont want to miss this one!

Charming bungalow with undeniable curb appeal in the heart of Canal Fulton! From the moment you arrive, you’ll appreciate the inviting exterior and thoughtful details that make this home feel special. Inside, you’ll find cute, updated finishes that blend character and comfort, creating a space that feels both cozy and functional. The first floor offers 1 bedroom, 1 full bath, living room, cute sitting area and eat in kitchen.  Upstairs you will find a quaint space that could offer 2 sleeping areas plus sitting area.  There is also a full basement.  A 2-car detached garage adds convenience and extra storage, while the prime location puts you just minutes from all the amenities Canal Fulton is known for—shops, dining, parks, the towpath, and community events. Whether you’re looking for your first home, a downsized retreat, or an easy-living lifestyle, this bungalow delivers charm, location, and livability all in one.

Better than new and tucked on a private cul-de-sac, this 4-bedroom home offers modern finishes, thoughtful design, and exceptional living space inside and out. Welcome to 11931 Walton Circle NW in Uniontown.....where comfort, style, and functionality come together in a home that still has that new-build feel. This beautifully maintained 4-bedroom residence features soaring vaulted ceilings and a spacious great room anchored by a stunning stone fireplace, creating a warm yet impressive gathering space. The open-concept kitchen and dinette area are perfect for everyday living and entertaining, complete with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and ample cabinetry. The first-floor owner’s suite offers convenience and privacy with a tiled en-suite bath, a large walk-in closet, and direct access to the laundry room for ultimate ease. Upstairs, you’ll find two additional generously sized bedrooms, a full bathroom, and a versatile loft space ideal for a gaming area, study nook, or home office. The finished basement expands your living space even further, featuring a full bathroom, a large bedroom with spacious closets, and a dedicated craft room, perfect for hobbies, guests, or multi-generational living. Step outside to enjoy the fully fenced backyard with an oversized gazebo and patio area, ideal for relaxing evenings or entertaining friends and family. Situated on a quiet cul-de-sac, this home offers limited traffic and added privacy. A rare opportunity to own a move-in-ready home with space, style, and an unbeatable setting.

The first-floor owner’s suite offers convenience and privacy with a tiled en-suite bath, a large walk-in closet, and direct access to the laundry room for ultimate ease. Upstairs, you’ll find two additional generously sized bedrooms, a full bathroom, and a versatile loft space ideal for a gaming area, study nook, or home office. The finished basement expands your living space even further, featuring a full bathroom, a large bedroom with spacious closets, and a dedicated craft room, perfect for hobbies, guests, or multi-generational living. Step outside to enjoy the fully fenced backyard with an oversized gazebo and patio area, ideal for relaxing evenings or entertaining friends and family. Situated on a quiet cul-de-sac, this home offers limited traffic and added privacy. A rare opportunity to own a move-in-ready home with space, style, and an unbeatable setting.

Looking for one-floor living and over an acre of your own? This charming ranch home set on a huge, sunny lot features classic brick and natural stone exterior with timeless appeal and modern conveniences. Lovingly maintained and move-in ready, this residence offers neutral decor and thoughtful details throughout, such as a whole-house generator, lighted closets, overhead lighting and ample storage. Clean and efficient heat with the boiler baseboard system. The bright eat-in kitchen features appliances that stay, a large window overlooking the generous backyard, as well as plenty of counter space and a convenient lighted pantry. The garage is attached via a breezeway, making it easy to bring home groceries and packages. Main bath features large vanity with double sinks, and white tiled tub/shower combination. Two large decorative fireplaces add to the charm of this home: one in the spacious living room, one in the basement. Basement is plumbed for a full bath. Washer and dryer stay. Home warranty for your peace of mind. Ideally located close to everything you need, this oasis is ready for you make it your own.

Welcome to this fully remodeled 4-bedroom, 2.5 bath home in the heart of Navarre! Blending modern updates with a warm, country feel, this property offers the best of both worlds. Step inside to find luxury vinyl plank flooring throughout the main areas, complemented by brand new carpet for added comfort. The stunning kitchen features quartz countertops, stylish backsplash, all-new cabinetry with sleek black hardware, and a full suite of new appliances, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. Also on the main floor is a full master en suite with a half bath/laundry room off the kitchen! All one floor living at your convenience! Upstairs and down, every space has been thoughtfully updated to create a move-in ready home with a fresh, modern flare. Outside, you’ll love the oversized detached three-car garage (24x34) ideal for storage, hobbies, or additional workspace.  Conveniently located just minutes from downtown Navarre, this home offers easy access to local shops, dining, and amenities while still maintaining a peaceful, country-like setting. Don’t miss your chance to own this beautifully updated home, schedule your showing today!

perfects.Public_Remarks: Turnkey investment opportunity! This fully updated 3-bedroom, 1-bath single-family home is a strong addition to any investor's portfolio. Currently tenant-occupied and generating $1,000 per month in rental income, this property offers immediate cash flow from day one. The home has been thoughtfully updated, providing low-maintenance ownership and long-term appeal. This would also make a lovely home for family. Located near elementary school.

Some things to know about the home. The home is essentially ready to move into. It will need window treatments such as rods and drapes. New owners may want to consider area rugs in areas where bare feet may be uncomfortable on the new vinyl strip floors. Water heater has not been tested. Hot water wasn’t needed during the rehab. Gas company will check the water heater if asked. Furnace works well so gas lines are okay. Sump pump wasn’t tested. This home has been entirely painted, all floor covering removed and replaced with new vinyl strip, plumbing and electrical checked and repaired as needed, ceiling fans replaced, and some carpentry work as needed. It is priced in accordance with others of similar size. This home was built in 2005 so plumbing, electrical, heating, air conditioning and roof are relatively young. Listing agent is also the owner. Offers will be considered where buyer is willing to accept the home as-is and finish the small remaining items all of which could be completed after move-in. Most recent sale in the cul-de-sac was in 2022 for $105,000 and it was not updated. Items that were not done during the rehab: Paint basement stairs, probably best after moving in washer and dryer. Clean the garage, paint steps into garage. In the spring. Closet doors not installed. Some folks now don’t want closet doors. Several styles are available for those who do want them. Bi-folds with or without louvers, accordian types like the one in the hall closet, standard hinged doors, cloth hanging types, doubles on sliding tracks. Kitchen set up for gas stove. Easy install for 220v line for electric stove. Material cost is about $76. Siding could use some cleaning, possibly a power wash. In the spring. We believe the garage door opener works but is not currently connected.

Charming Bungalow in the heart of Massillon! Updates include New Window Nation Windows in 2022 with a 15 Year Transferrable Warranty, New Chimney Cap, Garbage Disposal, Bluetooth Bathroom Vent, Ceiling Fans and Light Fixtures all in 2021, a Remodeled Full Bathroom and Tile Flooring in the Kitchen and Dining Room in 2020 and a New Roof in 2014. The Main Level has a Bright Living Room and 2 Bedrooms with Natural Hardwood Flooring, a Full Bath and Open Kitchen and Dining Room with a Sliding Glass Door onto the Deck. The Second Level has a Large Bedroom with extra Closet and Storage Space. The full-size basement has a Recreation Area, Laundry Room and additional Storage. The Backyard is Pet-Friendly with a Partial Fence, Deck, Brick Paver Patio and Garden Area. The Oversized 1 Car Garage has Electric and a Wood Burning Fireplace. Please call today for your private showing!

Investor special with tons of potential! This fixer-upper is the perfect opportunity for investors, flippers, or buyers looking to build equity with their own personal touch. The home features a one-car detached garage, mostly vinyl windows, and a newer roof (Less than 6 years old). The sizeable backyard offers plenty of room for outdoor entertaining, expansion, or added value. With solid bones and endless possibilities, this home is ready for someone with vision to bring it back to life. Don’t miss your chance to transform this property into something special! Schedule a showing today.

Fabulous opportunity in Lake Township! Covered front porch opens to hardwood foyer and spacious living room with crown molding. Large eat-in kitchen with breakfast bar and doors out to the deck overlooking a level backyard. Cozy family room just off the oversized two car garage. Upstairs has a large full bath that opens to the master bedroom with double closets. Two additional bedrooms also feature double closets. Large full basement with plenty of space to finish, 80 gallon water tank, new water softener system and storage galore. Rural location surrounded by farms, yet offering a neighborhood feeling!

Welcome to 1259 Lauren Crest St where easy living meets everyday comfort in the heart of Hartville. From the moment you step inside, you'll appreciate the bright, open layout that feels both airy and welcoming. The spacious living area flows naturally into the kitchen and dining space, making it easy to host friends, enjoy quiet evenings, or simply relax at the end of the day. Imagine starting your mornings with coffee in your private outdoor space or unwinding there in the evening as the day slows down. With exterior maintenance taken care of, your time is truly your own ,more walks in the park, more dinners out, more moments doing what you love. Whether you're ready to simplify, downsize, or embrace a low-maintenance lifestyle, this condo offers more than just a place to live, it offers a place to feel at home.

Tucked away on 2.48 secluded acres, this North Lawrence property offers privacy, nature, and opportunity in a peaceful setting. Completely rebuilt in 2017 from the foundation up, this ranch-style home provides a solid structure and a blank canvas for your vision. A creek runs through the property, while the home also sits near Lawrence Township Park, allowing you to enjoy both natural surroundings and nearby recreational space—without the two being connected. Mature trees surround the property, creating a private, wooded feel, especially in the summer months. Inside, the home features an open eat-in kitchen and living room, ideal for entertaining or everyday living. The layout includes three spacious bedrooms, a full hall bathroom, and a private owner’s suite with its own bathroom and a large walk-in closet. The home is all electric and equipped with central air. While the home does need some TLC, the potential is undeniable, both inside and out. With acreage, privacy, and a desirable ranch layout, this property is perfect for buyers looking to create their own retreat. Conveniently located near Route 21, offering easy highway access while still feeling tucked away from it all. Don’t miss this rare opportunity to own acreage in North Lawrence with space, privacy, and room to make it your own.

Welcome to 2407 Southway St SW, Massillon — where classic character meets extensive updates and outdoor space to enjoy. This 3-bedroom, 1-bath home offers 1,376 square feet of living space and sits on a full acre, providing room to spread out while still being conveniently located. Major updates completed in 2021 include the roof, windows, electric, plumbing, furnace, and central A/C — giving buyers confidence in the big-ticket items. In 2025, the kitchen was completely remodeled with granite countertops and stainless steel appliances, creating a modern and functional space for everyday living. Additional 2025 improvements include new interior bedroom doors and gutter covers for added efficiency and maintenance ease. French doors leads you outside to a deck and you’ll find standout features that truly set this property apart — a 21’ x 43’ above-ground swimming pool, hot tub, and two outdoor sheds with electric, offering excellent storage or workspace flexibility. To provide additional peace of mind, a 1-year home warranty is included. This property combines updates, outdoor amenities, and value — all on a spacious one-acre lot.

Welcome to this charming 3-bedroom ranch in Perry Township, just about a mile from Paul Brown Tiger Stadium! Offering 936 square feet of single-level living, this home is a great opportunity for first-time buyers, downsizers, or investors. The living room provides great natural light and plenty of room to relax. The kitchen features a newer cooktop and wall oven with ample cabinet space for storage. All three bedrooms are conveniently located on the main level along with a full bathroom featuring updated flooring. The full unfinished basement offers laundry and endless potential for additional living space, storage, or a workshop area. Additional highlights include central air (new in 2025), forced air gas heat, vinyl siding, public water and sewer, and a manageable 0.18-acre lot. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, and major routes!

This unit offers plenty of privacy and located at the end of the cul-de-sac and common area will not disappoint.  All new flooring—including tile and carpet—fresh paint throughout, updated light fixtures, and stunning design details set the tone for this move-in-ready 2-bedroom, 2 full bath ranch condo in Perry Township. From the custom tile work on the fireplace with stylish accent pieces to the stainless-steel appliances in the kitchen, every update has been thoughtfully completed. Major mechanical peace of mind comes with a NEW HVAC system, plus updated exhaust fans in both bathrooms and a new garbage disposal.  Step inside to a spacious living area highlighted by the beautifully updated fireplace, creating a warm and inviting focal point. The eat-in kitchen offers ample counter space, stainless steel appliances, and a charming dining nook ideal for everyday living or entertaining. The primary suite features a large walk-in closet and a primary bathroom.  The second bedroom provides flexible space for guests, a home office, or hobbies, conveniently located next to the second full bathroom.  Sliding glass doors lead to the private deck—freshly painted just two years ago—perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation. A door attached to the 2-car garage with a new screen door adds both convenience and functionality.  With extensive updates already completed, this condo offers true low-maintenance living in a convenient location near shopping, dining, and local amenities. Other highlights include first-floor laundry and an attached 2-car garage with a new screen door.   Located near Sippo Lake Park and Quick access to hiking, boating, and local shopping.  Easy access to all major highways.  This low-maintenance home offers comfort, accessibility, and convenience all in one. Schedule your private tour today!

AUCTION - THURS. MARCH 18th @ 2PM. ONLINE ONLY.   Handyman Special!  Property was built in 1875 as former motel and later converted to single family and then finally used in current condition as a duplex with 5 Bedrooms - 2 baths and is located on nice large city lot that is the furthest lot east of downtown along the north fork sugar creek, just outside community ballfields.  Property is in need of renovation.  Open: 2 hrs before the sale on March 18 or call office to schedule a viewing. Terms: $2,000 down day of sale with the balance due in full at closing. Property selling As-Is, Where-is, with all faults. Any desired inspections to be completed prior to the bidding. All information contained herein was derived from sources believed to be correct. Information is believed to be accurate but not guaranteed.

Stop! You don't want to miss out on this immaculate home located in the heart of North Canton. This home features 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms (1 full and 1 1/2 bath). The Over Sized 2 Car Garage is a bonus with covered access and lots of parking space! The kitchen has been updated with granite counter tops, modern back splash and updated cabinets. The kitchen appliances are newer including the refrigerator installed in 2026 and New Gas Range. The Center island in the kitchen can stay with the home. In September of 2025 a wall was knocked out to open up the kitchen and give more of a open concept feel. The main level also includes a guest bath, sun room, dining room and large living room. The upstairs has 3 bedrooms and a large full bathroom. Updates and Improvements: NEW METAL ROOF August 2025, Wall knocked out 2025, Tree removal and landscaping 2025, New dining room light fixture, Fenced in backyard, Added a closet in the basement which can be a office or additional room, New Boiler System 2022, AC 2022, Hot water tank 2020. All Gym equiptment in the basement can be purchased separately and is for sale. Please call to schedule a showing!
